title: eupatorium odoratum var. pauciflorum
intro: Eupatorium odoratum var. pauciflorum, commonly known as the Fragrant Boneset, is a variety of flowering plant in the sunflower family native to China. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eupatorium odoratum var. pauciflorum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe sore throats, calm fever, and alleviate respiratory discomfort.
